content.title: DocuShield
content.description: DocuShield is a secure document sharing and editing platform built as a modern Angular web application using Angular 20. Leveraging the latest Angular CLI and standalone components architecture, it offers a responsive foundation with advanced UI/UX patterns tailored for collaborative document workflows, including real-time editing, access controls, and secure sharing features.
content.role: I architected and configured the full Angular 20 project from the ground up, adopting standalone components and cutting-edge development practices. I implemented a robust TypeScript setup, SCSS-based styling, integrated testing frameworks, and ensured mobile-responsive designs. The app features a sleek landing page with CSS variables, gradient effects, and intuitive layouts optimized for document-centric user experiences.

achievements: Delivered a production-ready Angular 20 foundation for secure document collaboration
Streamlined modern workflows with automated testing and efficient builds
Designed a visually striking, responsive landing page using contemporary patterns
Fine-tuned build configurations for superior performance and bundle optimization
technologies: SCSS/CSS featuring modern variables and gradients
Jasmine & Karma for comprehensive unit testing
Angular CLI for scaffolding, builds, and workflows
Optimized production builds with performance budgets

screenshots: Screenshot of the landing page highlighting gradient designs and DocuShield branding*
